current_judgment: qwen2.5:14b with lore-safe-proofread-003 is the approved baseline. Clean output with no reasoning leakage. Protected terms preserved. Occasional minor phrasing drift remains a known limit. phi4:14b tested as challenger across 6-test harder suite but did not overtake qwen. Metrics are qualitative approximations from comparative manual review, not structured detection sets.
next_required_decision: Test next challenger model across the 6-test harder suite (lore-safe-test-001 through lore-safe-test-006) before considering baseline displacement.
provenance_notes: false_positive_rate and surface_detection_rate are qualitative approximations from comparative manual review across 6 test inputs vs phi4:14b. Interpreted as: FPR = rate of unnecessary preservation-damaging changes; SDR = rate of real errors correctly fixed. No frozen labeled case pack exists. Values are not equivalent to benchmark-derived detection metrics.
